import openpyxl

path = "/Users/tonjeharstad/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-Personlig/Økonomi - Tonje og Ane/Tonje/ATF kalkulator 1.mai 2023.xlsx"
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(path, data_only=False\)

print\("=== SHEETS ==="\)
for name in wb.sheetnames:
    print\(f"  - {name}"\)

print\(\)

for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
    print\(f"SHEET: {sheet_name}  \(max_row={ws.max_row}, max_col={ws.max_column}\)"\)
    print\('='*60\)
    for row in ws.iter_rows\(\):
        for cell in row:
            if cell.value is not None:
                print\(f"  [{cell.coordinate}] value={repr\(cell.value\)}"\)

EOF)

Bash(node -e "
const aarslonn = 720100
const timesats = aarslonn / 1850
const OT50  = timesats * 1.5
const OT100 = timesats * 2
const OTA50 = OT50 / 3
const natt = timesats * 0.45
const ettermiddag = 25, lordag = 65, sondag = 65

const ovingHverdag = \(\(OT100*10 + OT50*6\) * \(8.67/16\)\) + \(\(ettermiddag*4 + natt*10\) * 2/16\)
const ovingHelg    = \(\(OT100*24 + lordag*24\) * \(11.33/24\)\) + \(\(sondag*24 + natt*10\) * 2/24\)
const ovingPrTimeHverdag = ovingHverdag / 16
const ovingPrTimeHelg    = ovingHelg / 24
const ovingInntil7t50Hverdag  = \(OT50*0.75\) + \(OTA50*0.25\)
const ovingInntil7t100Hverdag = \(OT50 + OT100\) / 2
const ovingInntil7tHelg       = \(OT50 + OT100\) / 2 + lordag

console.log\('timesats:', timesats.toFixed\(2\)\)
console.log\('ovingHverdag:', ovingHverdag.toFixed\(2\), '\(expected 6348.16\)'\)
console.log\('ovingHelg:', ovingHelg.toFixed\(2\), '\(expected 9832.67\)'\)
console.log\('ovingPrTimeHverdag:', ovingPrTimeHverdag.toFixed\(2\), '\(expected 396.76\)'\)
console.log\('ovingPrTimeHelg:', ovingPrTimeHelg.toFixed\(2\), '\(expected 409.69\)'\)
console.log\('ovingInntil7t50Hverdag:', ovingInntil7t50Hverdag.toFixed\(2\), '\(expected 486.55\)'\)
console.log\('ovingInntil7t100Hverdag:', ovingInntil7t100Hverdag.toFixed\(2\), '\(expected 681.18\)'\)
console.log\('ovingInntil7tHelg:', ovingInntil7tHelg.toFixed\(2\), '\(expected 746.18\)'\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import openpyxl

path1 = "/Users/tonjeharstad/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-Personlig/Økonomi - Tonje og Ane/Prosjekt/Spare- og fakturalogg.xlsm"

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(path1, keep_vba=True, data_only=True\)
ws = wb['SpareFakturaLogg']

print\(f"Dimensions: {ws.dimensions}"\)
print\(f"Max row: {ws.max_row}, Max col: {ws.max_column}"\)

        break
    print\(f"  Row {i+1}: {row}"\)
